ddls:
CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "text" TEXT /* The text of the customer feedback or review */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the feedback (e.g., product review, support ticket, social media) */,
  "source_id" TEXT /* The unique identifier from the source system */,
  "language" TEXT /* The language of the feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* The overall sentiment of the feedback (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* The confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "aspect_count" INTEGER /* The number of aspects mentioned in the feedback */,
  "priority" TEXT /* The priority of the feedback (high, medium, low) */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the feedback (new, in progress, resolved) */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the product or service the feedback is related to */,
  "region" TEXT /* The region from which the feedback was received (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aspects" (
  "aspect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aspect */,
  "aspect_term" TEXT /* The term or feature mentioned in the feedback */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the aspect */,
  "aspect_type" TEXT /* The type of the aspect (e.g., design, performance, service) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the category the aspect belongs to (e.g., hardware, software) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aspect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_aspects" (
  "feedback_aspect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback-aspect relationship */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback entry */,
  "aspect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aspect mentioned in the feedback */,
  "term_location" TEXT /* The location of the aspect term within the text (e.g., 69--84) */,
  "sentiment_class" INTEGER /* The sentiment class of the aspect (0 for neutral, 1 for positive, -1 for negative) */,
  "sentiment_confidence" REAL /* The confidence score of the sentiment for the specific aspect */,
  "aspect_priority" TEXT /* The priority of the aspect within the feedback (high, medium, low) */,
  "aspect_status" TEXT /* The status of the aspect (new, in progress, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_aspect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_aspects_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES feedback ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_aspects_aspect_id FOREIGN KEY ("aspect_id") REFERENCES aspects ("aspect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Amazon Product Reviews, Support Tickets) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., Product Review, Support Ticket, Social Media) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* The URL of the source (if applicable) */,
  "source_type_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the type of the source (e.g., Product Review, Support Ticket, Social Media) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., product manager, data analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the team the user belongs to (e.g., product team, support team) */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* The last activity date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the feedback */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, respond) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments made by the user during access */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Any action taken by the user (e.g., resolved issue, escalated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_access_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES feedback ("feedback_id")
)
